description.value: Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Used for rolling to hit when fighting in ranged or melee combat, in place of any other skills. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling checks involving feats of physicality, including athletics and evasion. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling when making checks that require training or finesse. Note: if the task is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers accordingly. Does not use a modifier.
Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.
Deals no damage. If hit roll DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs. On a fail take the Damaged Eye and Damaged Ear Critical injuries (see pg. 188) for 1 minute. No Crit damage dealt.

A basic lob or pitch of an object. Use an Action to make a Ranged Attack at up to 25m/yds. Targets can choose to Dodge your throw if they can Dodge bullets. Melee weapons deal their base damage, but don't penetrate half SP.
A heavy SMG. Due to its size it can't be concealed.
Built in agent. Audio only but can be linked with other cybergear.
Must be paired. Provides immunity to dazzling effects (like flashbangs).
Must be paired. Ignore any vision penalties due to lighting or fog/smoke.
Provides immunity to deafness or sudden loud noises.

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

Intended as a direct substitute/improvement to regular armor, to compensate for ablation changes.

-1 to REF, DEX, and MOVE - these penalties do not stack with those for the helmet, and are removed by a BODY stat of 7 or higher (change the armor penalty stat in the item settings tab)..

Anytime the stun baton deals damage, the attack target must make an Endurance check: DV = 10+dmg (max DV: 16). On failure, the target's MOVE is reduced by 4 and all actions they attempt suffer a -4 penalty until the end of their next turn. An actor can only suffer from one instance of this effect during each of their turns.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 3/Rank-And-File - Low-level but accredited members of NC's various groups, with enough authority to wear the org's colors but not enough to pose a real threat on their own.

Corp-Wide Ability - Corp-Mandated Upgrades: All RatSec agents are equipped with Anti-Dazzle in both eyes and Level Damper in both ears, as well as internal agents. For every three agents in a scene, add a RatSec Mini Air Drone or Ground Drone to accompany them. They will always attempt to contact the NCPD when engaged, even if engaged in criminal action themselves. When arriving on the scene, the NCPD will always give priority to the accounts of RatSec, will not be hostile to them, and will take orders from Execs.

Ability - Home-Field Advantage: An elite may touch a disguised smart-surface with their hand as an action, so long as that surface is corporate property. If they do so, they can take control of the scene’s electronics, including lights. Additionally, choose one:

  • A compartment opens nearby which contains a loaded shotgun or assault rifle & an extra magazine for it.

  • A compartment opens nearby which leads out of the scene, or functions as a hiding place.

  • A compartment opens nearby to reveal a RatSec mini air drone, ground drone, or automated turret, which join the initiative at the end of the elite’s next turn.

Corporate thugs. They call themselves security but they’re bullies for corporate willpower, like cops with different color shirts. How many bodies each night do you think get blamed on the gangs that are actually some skezzed-up corpo eurojunkie on a power trip, eh? Keep an eye open - they have total immunity and they’re not afraid to use it.
